name: editor4c: Shift+Enter inserts a line break within the current block
_note:
Phase B pilot — no 4B fixture exercises Shift+Enter (insertLineBreak). Distinct from Enter (insertParagraph): Enter splits the block; Shift+Enter emits a
within the same block. Uses key_combo to model the shift modifier on Enter — verifies the intent-from-input-event Shift-key branch fires.
